case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS SPEAR, ROB

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT SPEAR, ROB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPEAR, ROB $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.87, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
